text: Inside the glass-walled room, I felt a kind of sterility, an impersonal order giving way to the echo of possibility. Now, here in front of the R+D wall, the mood shifts. The bold text and vibrant colors pulse with intellectual promise, inviting a more curious, energetic presence. Even as I read about the balance of routine and expression in an office, I sense myself becoming more aware of the border between work and wonder. I feel contemplative, on the cusp of discovery, both inside the structure and outside it, watching ideas flicker to life.
